method: For each op: 1) torch.jit.trace -> .pt with REAL get_inputs() shapes AND dtypes (bool/i64/f32 etc.); 2) run pnnx with optlevel=2 (required to lift aten::* into PNNX F./nn. ops); 3) judge SUPPORTED iff returncode==0, .ncnn.param exists, has >=1 non-{Input,Output,Split} layer, AND no aten::*/prim::* residual in .pnnx.param + .ncnn.param.

Cast.reason: is identity op (no compute layers emitted is correct, not unsupported)

ROIAlign.reason: needs torchvision (audit env limitation, not ncnn limitation)

Where_scalar.reason: scalar inputs not supported by the audit harness's shape format
